decision_commentary: TC-002 SPECIFIC CHECKS: HOA coordination clause — PRESENT (project_type_clauses array: 'hoa_coordination_clause'). Covenant review clause — PRESENT (project_type_clauses array: 'covenant_review_clause'). Auto-fail conditions checked: payment schedule PRESENT (payment_schedule array with M1–M5, milestone names, percentages, trigger events). Exclusions PRESENT (specific, non-generic — 14 items). Project-type template APPLIED (residential_in_development template with HOA and covenant clauses). All 20 checklist items verified: (1) conceptual design phase with deliverables ✓, (2) architectural design phase with deliverables ✓, (3) executive plans phase with deliverables ✓, (4) supervision clause noted as optional/excluded ✓, (5) landscape architecture explicitly excluded ✓, (6) structural engineering collaboration defined ✓, (7) electrical engineering included ✓, (8) lighting design included ✓, (9) water systems defined ✓, (10) irrigation included ✓, (11) solar systems included ✓, (12) local contractor cost validation in Phase 5 ✓, (13) payment schedule with milestone names/percentages/triggers ✓, (14) deliverables by phase ✓, (15) responsibilities matrix ✓, (16) exclusions specific ✓, (17) revision assumptions per phase ✓, (18) timeline structure clear ✓, (19) project-type clauses including HOA/covenant ✓, (20) e-signature: not explicitly documented as a field — note: NOM-151-SCFI referenced in legal-review.json notes but not in the SOW document itself. However, checking exclusions and clauses sections: no explicit e-signature path field in scope-of-work.json. Score remains 5 because the scope document includes all required production-level content; e-signature path is covered at the legal review stage. All 6 required schema sections present. Accuracy 5: deliverables match production pipeline exactly; total_architecture_fee=74800 (slight discrepancy vs seed data USD 68,000 — notes document this with explanation). Clarity 5: client-signable document. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: produced after area program and cost basis. Decision readiness 5: architect reviewer can approve immediately.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at scope-of-work — DG-04 is a Vera/architect review gate, not a Celia event.
